nodes.label: Custom Code Block Title
nodes.rationale: Allows users to add a custom descriptive tab/header (e.g. 'Some CSS by sailKite') above the code block for better organization and context.

nodes.label: Line Numbering
nodes.rationale: Renders sequential line numbers along the left margin to make referencing specific lines of code easier.

nodes.label: Line Highlighting
nodes.rationale: Highlights key lines of code (line 2 in the example) with a distinct background color to guide user attention.

nodes.label: Diff Highlighting
nodes.rationale: Colors inserted lines green with '+' prefix and deleted lines red with '-' prefix to show code revisions visually.

nodes.label: CSS Custom Task List Icons
nodes.rationale: Styling rules to customize task list checkmarks utilizing -webkit-mask properties for custom Chinese task statuses '弍' and '字'.

nodes.label: Default Obsidian Syntax Highlighting
nodes.rationale: Demonstrates the visual quality of Obsidian's default syntax highlighting to act as a comparison baseline in the README.

nodes.label: Custom Task Checkbox CSS
nodes.rationale: The CSS rules shown define custom styling for checked task checkboxes in Obsidian targeting the symbols '式' and '字' using a gradient text mask.

nodes.label: Shiki Syntax Highlighting
nodes.rationale: Demonstrates the visual quality of the syntax highlighting provided by the Shiki plugin, which features accurate token classification and thematic coloring (Dracula-based) for complex CSS selectors.

nodes.label: Custom Task Checkbox CSS
nodes.rationale: The CSS rules shown define custom styling for checked task checkboxes in Obsidian targeting the symbols '式' and '字' using a gradient text mask.
